title: Unexpected behaviour when forceable and public are used in the same project

features.name: forceable port attribute
features.description: Code should include a module port marked with /* verilator forceable */ attribute

features.name: public signal attribute
features.description: Code should include a module with a signal marked with /* verilator public */ attribute

features.name: cross-module forceable-public attribute interaction
features.description: Code should include a module with a public signal that instantiates another module with forceable ports
